mapper.insert: insert into b_user (username , password , salt , nickname , mobile , qq , email , avatar_url , valid , created_time , modified_time ) value (#{username} , #{password }, #{ salt }, #{nickname },#{ mobile} , #{qq} , #{email }, #{avatarUrl }, #{valid }, now(), now() )
mapper.select: select id , username , password , salt , nickname , mobile , qq , email , avatar_url avatarUrl , valid , created_time createdTime , modified_time modifiedTime from b_user where id = #{id}
